jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Myntra
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
